name: Steel Mill Slab Design - CR1
content: Certain combinations of colours are incompatible and cannot be processed together in the same slab. A list of forbidden pairs of colours is provided, and no slab may contain orders whose colours form one of these forbidden pairs.
value_info: `orders`: List of dicts, each with `size` (int) and `color` (int), representing customer orders.
`forbidden_pairs`: List[List[int]] of pairs [color_a, color_b], where no slab may contain orders of both color_a and color_b simultaneously.

var1.descr: `order_to_slab`: List[int] of length n_orders, where order_to_slab[i] is the slab index assigned to order i.

var2.descr: `slab_loads`: List[int] of length n_slabs, where slab_loads[j] is the total weight of orders assigned to slab j.

var3.descr: `slab_losses`: List[int] of length n_slabs, where slab_losses[j] is the wasted capacity on slab j.

complexity.difficulty_rationale: Adds a single localized constraint family over existing use_color variables, with no new decision variables or structural changes.

cr_impact.notes: Adds one forbidden-pair constraint per slab over the existing use_color variable, for 1 × 6 = 6 scalar constraints.
